passives.name: Safeguard
passives.effects: Become ''Safeguarded'' to reduce incoming champion damage by 50%, lingering for 3 seconds after taking damage from a champion (30 second cooldown, timer restarts upon taking damage from champions).

effects_structured.raw: Become ''Safeguarded'' to reduce incoming champion damage by 50%, lingering for 3 seconds after taking damage from a champion (30 second cooldown, timer restarts upon taking damage from champions).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Safeguard is a defensive passive state that applies only to incoming champion damage, lingers 3 seconds after champion damage is taken, and then enters a 30-second cooldown that restarts on champion damage events.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped via Prismatic Item Anvils; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation prices (total 1000 / sell 400) while page-level presentation shows anvil-style acquisition (cost 0 / sell 2000).
Known-bug note retained as non-canonical behavior: page notes mention a spell-shield interaction bug; structured data models intended Safeguard behavior by default.
